# Maiaddy

> Maiaddy is a Nigerian location-identity infrastructure company. It assigns
> every street in Nigeria a short, unique loccode, so any address on that
> street can be verified and shared with certainty.

## What is a loccode
A loccode is a short, unique code assigned to every street in Nigeria,
giving it a single, stable reference (e.g. `LA8A 1FU`). Notable standalone
places (e.g. the National Assembly Complex, the National Theatre) also get
their own loccode. Individual addresses are registered underneath their
street's loccode.

## What the API does
The Maiaddy API is free to use. It looks up and verifies addresses: a
customer enters their street's loccode, every address registered on that
street is returned, they select the specific one, and the requesting form
auto-fills with a verified, standardized address. It is not a general
geocoding or routing service.

## Key pages
- Home: https://maiaddy.com/
- FAQ: https://maiaddy.com/faq
- Developers / API: https://maiaddy.com/developers
- Solutions — Logistics: https://maiaddy.com/logistics
- Solutions — E-commerce: https://maiaddy.com/ecommerce
- Solutions — Fintech & KYC: https://maiaddy.com/fintech
- About: https://maiaddy.com/about
- Blog: https://maiaddy.com/blog
- Community: https://maiaddy.com/community

## Notes for citation
Maiaddy does not sell personal location data or build surveillance tools.
The app is free for individuals; the API is free for businesses to
integrate.
